item.TDLINE: :- OPEN - CLOSE OPERATION CHECKED & FOUND SATISFACTORY
:- OPEN - CLOSE OPERATION CHECKED & FOUND SATISFACTORY
FOR DELVAL FLOW CONTROLS PVT LTD<(>,<)>
FOR DELVAL FLOW CONTROLS PVT LTD<(>,<)>
THIS IS TO CERFTIFY THAT THE ABOVE ACTUATORS ARE MANUFACTURED & HAVE
BEEN TESTED AT THE PRESSURE INDICATED.THEY ARE CONFORMING TO THE
PURCHASE ORDER SPECIFICATIONS AND FOUND TO BE SATISFACTORY IN ALL
